name: WhatsApp
description: WhatsApp Business API integration - send and receive messages via Twilio
author: Agent Player Team

settingsUI.title: WhatsApp Business Configuration
settingsUI.description: Configure WhatsApp via Twilio Business API

fields.name: account_sid
fields.label: Twilio Account SID
fields.helpText: Get from Twilio Console → Account Info → Account SID

fields.name: auth_token
fields.label: Twilio Auth Token
fields.helpText: Get from Twilio Console → Account Info → Auth Token

fields.name: webhook_url
fields.label: Webhook URL
fields.helpText: Public URL for receiving WhatsApp messages

fields.name: allowed_numbers
fields.label: Allowed Numbers (Optional)
fields.helpText: Comma-separated list of phone numbers allowed to message bot
